subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken thou unto the Voice of Him Who is remembered, for verily He remembereth thee through His grace. He, verily, is the Forgiving, the Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد ان استمع ندآء المذکور انه یذکرک بالفضل انه لهو الغفور الرحیم ان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
